markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client account health, identify risks, and align on mitigation strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Rapid is at high churn risk.** Leadership is prioritizing a $30k event over the $100k GrowthX contract. Kyle will attempt a save with decision-maker Mark W. before the Dec 9 end date.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**A technical SEO resource bottleneck is causing client friction.** Unfulfilled contract obligations (Rimkus, Bubble) are creating risk. Talal is overloaded and will be moved to the Director board for better visibility and management.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
  - [**Superhuman's post-acquisition strategy is undefined.** The rebrand creates a major upsell opportunity, but internal confusion is the main blocker. Marcel's relationship with Yuri, the new Head of Growth, is the key to unlocking this.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [**The new Notion dashboard will track weekly health score changes.** This will enable proactive risk management by highlighting accounts with declining scores for immediate discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Topics

### Process & Tooling

  - [**New Notion Dashboard:** George created a new view to track weekly health score changes, including the score delta.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable proactive risk management by highlighting declining scores for immediate discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Meeting Format:** Bridget proposed a new agenda:](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
    1.  [Review accounts with declining scores.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
    2.  [Quick gut-check on accounts with rising scores.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
    3.  [Discuss nominated accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Bottleneck:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Problem:** Contracted technical SEO audits for Rimkus and Bubble are unfulfilled due to a lack of internal capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Impact:** This is creating client friction and risk.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
      - [**Solution:** Move Talal to the Director board to centralize and manage his workload, which includes the Bubble AI work.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** The team will discuss hiring a dedicated technical SEO resource.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)

### High-Risk Accounts

  - [**Rapid (Churn Risk)**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Risk:** High churn probability. Leadership is prioritizing a $30k event over the $100k GrowthX contract, citing events as their most effective channel.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Mark S. expressed interest in a lower-cost, self-serve option (e.g., $100–$1,000/mo) that fits a discretionary budget.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle will contact Mark W. (decision-maker) before the Dec 9 end date to attempt a save.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Superhuman (Upsell Opportunity Blocked by Internal Chaos)**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [**Context:** The recent rebrand (Oct 29) created a massive upsell opportunity to serve the full product bundle (Mail, Grammarly, Coda, Go).](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Internal strategy is undefined. The current blog is product-specific, and the team lacks a clear content plan for the new, combined entity.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
      - [**Key Player:** Yuri, the new Head of Growth, is likely orchestrating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [**Action:** Leverage Marcel's relationship with Yuri to gain clarity and influence the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [**Engine (New Stakeholder Risk)**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**Risk:** Luke, former Head of Growth at Ramp, is the new Head of Growth at Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
      - [**Concern:** Luke's experience with a different pricing model (Ramp's) could create friction with Engine's current $15k/mo, 5-article contract.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** Over-deliver on performance and momentum to build a strong case for value.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### Stable & Improving Accounts

  - [**Exec**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
      - [**Status:** Recovered from a non-renewal threat.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - **Reason:** A comprehensive backlinking analysis and new strategy from Talal, combined with strong performance (competitor content ranking \#1), satisfied the client.
  - [**Metronome**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [**Status:** Client is unresponsive and canceling meetings, likely due to an internal marketing team reset.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Action:** Proactively delivered out-of-scope keyword research to build goodwill. Matthew will contact champion Maddie for an internal status check.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [**Sentinel-1**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Status:** Score increased due to momentum from the CVE launch.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Editorial approval is a major bottleneck. The team is pivoting to content refreshes to navigate the client's large content library and avoid perceived cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Udemy**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Status:** Score is low due to a tough sprint, but the relationship is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The client's slow review process ("Udemy slow") is the primary bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Contact Mark W. at Rapid to attempt a contract save before the Dec 9 end date.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Collaborate with Talal on the Bubble AI project.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [**Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Invoice Home Base for 50% of the remaining contract term.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Coordinate with Andi to move Talal to the Director board.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
      - [Ask Tyler to remove "technical SEO audit" from the contract template.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [Follow up with Home Base on the one-pager.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [File a ticket for the Rimkus SEO audit.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [Ask Ren to investigate Superhuman's internal strategy and the role of Yuri.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [Contact Maddie at Metronome for an internal status check.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
      - [Tag Kyle in Linear tickets for urgent items, noting his absence next Mon/Tues.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [Post in Slack for async prioritization help on Linear tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/XqkoUx_GjgZ-m9_SXqEX4BgwW3B7gUa3?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
